mentions.note: Enterprise software business suffering valuation collapse; acquisition strategy of buying software companies no longer in favor; Q4 revenue miss plus full-year guidance miss; won't recover until software cohort exits penalty box.

Mixed quarter with revenue miss paired to small earnings beat; full-year guidance missed on every line; current quarter guidance short; enterprise software cohort out of fashion (valuations compressed like Service Now, Adobe, Salesforce); unlikely to bounce until software gets respect again.
